units.title: Genitive Case
units.description: Possession (kniha bratra), quantities (hodně), prepositions (bez, z/ze, do, od), negation objects

units.title: Dative Case
units.description: Indirect objects (dávám kamarádovi), verbs with dative (pomáhat, rozumět, telefonovat), líbit se, chutnat

units.title: Locative & Instrumental Cases
units.description: Locative: o kom/čem?, v/na + loc. Instrumental: s kým/čím?, means of transport, professions (pracuju jako…), time expressions

units.title: Past Tense — Full Conjugation
units.description: All persons, gender agreement, motion verbs (šel/šla/šli), perfective aspect intro (napsat vs psát), time markers (včera, minulý týden)

units.title: Future Tense & Conditional
units.description: Perfective future (napíšu), imperfective future (budu psát), conditional (chtěl bych, mohl bych), kdybych…

units.title: Comparisons & Advanced Adjectives
units.description: Comparative (-ější/-ší), superlative (nej-), comparisons with než, adverbs, dobrý→lepší, špatný→horší, velký→větší

units.title: Complex Sentences & Conjunctions
units.description: že (that), protože (because), když (when), až (when in future), jestli (if/whether), aby (so that), word order in subordinate clauses

units.title: Modal Verbs & Permission
units.description: Learn modal verbs muset (must), moct (can), and smět (be allowed to) for expressing obligation, ability, permission, and prohibition in everyday situations.

units.title: Health & Body
units.description: Learn body parts, health vocabulary, and how to communicate at the doctor and pharmacy. Practice expressing pain, symptoms, and medical needs.

units.title: Work, Professions & Education
units.description: Learn professions, workplace vocabulary, and education terminology. Practice describing jobs, studying, and workplace communication using instrumental and accusative cases.

units.title: Housing & Home
units.description: Learn housing vocabulary, rooms, furniture, and household activities. Practice describing where things are using locative and prepositions of location.

units.title: Verbs of Motion & Prefixed Verbs
units.description: Learn Czech motion verbs (jít, jet, chodit, jezdit) and their prefixed forms. Practice the imperfective/perfective aspect distinction through directional movement.

units.title: A2 Exam Preparation
units.description: Practice with A2-level exam-format exercises: reading comprehension (5 tasks), listening comprehension (5 recordings), writing tasks (emails, diary, excuses, invitations), and speaking practice (monologue, role-play, picture discussion). Modeled on the official Czech permanent residence A2 exam (new format April 2026).

units.title: A2 Review & Consolidation
units.description: Review and consolidate all A2 grammar and vocabulary: complete case system, past/future/conditional tenses, verbal aspect, adjective comparison, modal verbs, complex sentences, and formal communication vocabulary.
